title: My favorite Govee smart lamps are at their lowest prices ever for Prime Day
summary: Govee's color-changing smart lamps are discounted during Prime Day, with models like the Table Lamp 2 and Floor Lamp Basic at record low prices, offering multi-color support, music syncing, voice control, and Matter compatibility.
content:
We’ve already rounded up the best Philips Hue deals of Prime Day, but if you’re looking for something a little more budget-friendly, Govee’s latest sale is worth checking out. The company has heavily discounted several of its color-changing smart lamps, including the Table Lamp 2 ($53.99, down from $79.99), Floor Lamp Basic ($59.99, regularly $99.99), the portable Table Lamp Classic ($55.99, down from $79.99), and Uplighter Floor Lamp ($125.99, down from $179.99). I own all but the Portable Table Lamp Classic and regularly recommend them to friends.
No matter which lamp you choose, you’re getting a similar experience. Each supports millions of colors and adjustable white light, comes with a variety of preset scenes, and can sync its lighting to music. You can also create custom scenes, schedules, and automations in Govee’s app or control the lamps with your voice using Amazon Alexa or Google Assistant. Plus, with the exception of the Floor Lamp Basic, they all support Matter, allowing them to work with other major smart home platforms too.
Govee Table Lamp 2

Where to Buy:

 $79.99 at Amazon
 $79.99 $69.99 at Best Buy
 $79.99 $63.99 at Govee


Govee Table Lamp Classic

Where to Buy:

 $79.99 $55.99 at Amazon
 $79.99 $55.99 at Govee

The biggest differences come down to size and where they’ll fit best. The small Table Lamp 2 is ideal for a nightstand or desk, while the portable Table Lamp Classic swaps the power cord for a rechargeable battery, making it easy to move from room to room or take outside onto a patio. Just keep in mind it isn’t weather-resistant, so you’ll only want to take it out when it’s not raining.
Govee Floor Lamp

Where to Buy:

 $99.99 $59.99 at Amazon
 $99.99 $59.99 at Best Buy
 $99.99 $59.99 at Govee


Govee Uplighter Floor Lamp

Where to Buy:

 $179.99 $125.99 at Amazon
 $179.99 $125.99 at Walmart
 $179.99 $125.99 at Govee

The Floor Lamp Basic and Uplighter Floor Lamp, meanwhile, are both designed to brighten larger spaces. The minimalist Flo

title: South Korea plans to train entire military as "drone warriors"
summary: South Korea will train its 500,000-strong military force to use drones as universal combat tools, reflecting the strategic shift toward unmanned warfare capabilities in modern military operations.
content: Half-million strong military will train on drones as “universal combat tool.”

zh.title: 韩国计划将整个军队训练成"无人机战士"
zh.summary: 韩国将训练其50万人的军队使用无人机作为通用作战工具,反映了现代军事行动中向无人战争能力转变的战略转换。

title: After covering Prime Day for 36 hours over four days, this is the one thing I bought
summary: A Verge editor purchased Vampliers—Japanese screw extraction pliers—during Prime Day after recognizing their utility for removing stripped screws. The tool is on sale for $25.58, offering a practical solution to a common household frustration.
content:
I’m ready for the Vamplier weekend. | Photo: Antonio G. Di Benedetto / The Verge	

We’ve covered so many deals during Prime Day that my head is spinning. But after four days of doing our damndest to try and help folks save money, the thing I’m most hyped for is a simple tool for fixing my most egregious mistakes. I bought a pair of Vampliers.
If you’re unfamiliar, Vampliers are Japanese-made pliers designed for one simple task: removing stripped screws. I don’t even remember when I first heard of them, but I threw one on my wishlist long ago and thought, “I should get one of these eventually.” That time is now: the standard 6.25-inch VT-001 Vampliers is on sale for $25.58 (about $6 off) at Amazon.
Vampire Tools VT-001 Vampliers 6.25-inch screw extractor pliers

Where to Buy:

 $31.97 $25.58 at Amazon
 $31.97 at Vampire Tools

I recommended a smaller pair of Vampliers in our roundup of Prime Day deals under $25. I knew from people I trust how handy these things are. I even read Chris Person’s excellent ode to his Engineer “Neji-Saurus” pliers, which are the same thing with a green handle. (Engineer makes both sets of pliers; Vampire Tools distributes rebranded Engineer tools in the US.) 
Over the years, I’ve abandoned far too many stripped screws in door jambs, junction boxes, and even under my desk. And now I finally have a means to correct my mistakes. Maybe it’s the full pot of coffee I’ve been drinking every day since Tuesday, but I’m done with Prime Day and I’m done with stripped screws.

zh.title: 四天覆盖36小时Prime Day后,这是我购买的唯一东西
zh.summary: Verge编辑在Prime Day期间购买了Vampliers(吸血鬼钳)——一种日本螺丝提取工具——在发现其移除损坏螺丝的实用性后。该工具以25.58美元的价格出售,为常见的家庭困扰提供了实用的解决方案。

title: Corgi, the buzzy Y Combinator-backed insurance tech startup, says it didn’t steal an open source product
summary: Insurance tech startup Corgi denied accusations from Papermark that it stole open-source software, raising questions about the line between inspiration and plagiarism in startup development.
content: Corgi became embroiled in  controversy when Papermark accused it of stealing its software. Corgi says it did not, raising new questions about vibe coding.

title: Doctors suspected man had brain cancer. He actually had worms.
summary: Doctors initially diagnosed a patient with brain cancer based on symptoms, only to discover that parasitic worms were responsible for the condition, highlighting the importance of thorough medical investigation.
content: His doctors went looking for cancer, then they saw the worms' heads.

title: Our favorite Prime Day gadgets under $100 you don’t need but will really want
summary: The Verge curates affordable gadgets under $100 available during Prime Day, including smart switches and E Ink displays, that offer novel functionality despite not being essential purchases, highlighting Prime Day's appeal for impulse tech buys.
content:
Govee’s floor lamps are just $60. | Image: Govee:	

Prime Day has a funny way of convincing you to buy things you weren’t shopping for in the first place. You sign on intending to buy something sensible you actually need, like a pack of USB-C cables, and an hour later you’ve also added a gadget that can press your coffee maker’s power button and a color-changing smart lamp that syncs to music to your cart. 
They aren’t exactly essentials, but they’re the kind of gadgets you never knew you wanted until you saw them and often end up being the most delightful to own. From a pocket-size gaming controller and a tiny crafting machine that lets you make stickers and cards to a cordless barcode scanner that lets you catalog your home library like a real librarian, these are the Verge-approved small gadgets you probably don’t need but will totally want anyway, most of which cost less than $100.
SwitchBot Smart Switch Button Pusher
If you’ve ever wished you had a robot that could push a button for you, that’s precisely what SwitchBot’s Smart Switch does. It’s simple, smart, and works on anything with a button. Stick it on the device you want to turn on or off, and you’re set. 

Where to Buy:

 $29.99 $19.99 at Amazon
 $29.99 $20.09 at SwitchBot (with code PDDAY33)

VidaBay Snap E Ink fridge magnet
VidaBay’s Snap is the best kind of retrofuturism. It looks like a classic instant photo, but instead of relying on an actual print, it uses a color E Ink screen you can change at any time using the NFC chip inside your phone. The magnetic digital Polaroids don’t need to be charged, either, which is always a plus in our book.

Where to Buy:

 $35.99 $25.45 at Amazon
 $35.99 $29.99 at Vidabay
 $99.99 $86.99 at Vidabay (three-pack)

Philips Hue smart bulb starter kit
The Philips Hue smart bulb starter kit comes with color-changing bulbs that can be controlled with Alexa, Google Assistant, or the companion app. The included Hue Bridge lets you set custom lighting routines and expand you

zh.title: 我们最喜欢的Prime Day 100美元以下科技产品，你不需要但会很想要
zh.summary: The Verge精选了Prime Day期间100美元以下的实惠小工具，包括智能开关和电子纸显示屏，这些产品功能新颖但非必需，突出了Prime Day对冲动购物的吸引力。

title: These are the best deals you can still get on MacBooks before Apple’s price hike kicks in
summary: Apple raised Mac and iPad prices during Prime Day, making existing discounts more valuable—a 13-inch MacBook Air M5 with a $150 discount becomes a $350 savings under new pricing, creating a window for significant savings.
content:
Apple just raised the prices on Macs and iPads in response to the rising costs of memory chips, right in the middle of Amazon Prime Day. That means existing discounts (even small ones) on Apple laptops like the MacBook Neo, MacBook Air, and MacBook Pro just became significantly better deals.
As an example, the 13-inch MacBook Air M5 that used to start at $1,099 and is currently on sale for $949.99 (at Costco) will soon carry a full retail price of $1,299. That initial $150 discount just became a savings of $350 compared to Apple’s upcoming pricing.
There’s no guarantee how long existing sales will stick around, and no official word on when major laptop retailers will reset all their Mac pricing to reflect the increases. Best Buy and B&H Photo have already updated their pricing, but some older prices or even cheaper deals are lingering at Amazon. Costco lists its member-only deals as valid through June 26th or 27th. 
If you were considering an Apple computer purchase, it might be best to make a move while you can. We’re outlining all the deals we can find below.
MacBook Neo deals
MacBook Neo
Apple’s most affordable laptop, with a 13-inch display, A18 Pro chip, 8GB of RAM, and optional Touch ID fingerprint sensor. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $799 $689.99 at Amazon (512GB, pink)
 $699 $599 at Best Buy (256GB)
 $699 $589.99 at Costco (256GB, citrus)

The base 256GB MacBook Neo is selling for $589.99 at Amazon and Costco (in the citrus color only). Normally that’d be a paltry $10 discount, but with Apple raising the Neo’s base price to $699 it’s now a savings of $110. The 512GB version with Touch ID is $689.99 (a $110 discount compared to the new price) at Amazon and Costco. Best Buy still has the base 256GB model and 512GB model for the old prices of $599 and $699, respectively. That at least saves you the $100 price increase for now.
MacBook Air deals
Apple MacBook Air (M5)
Apple’s 2026 MacBook Air has an M5 chip and starts with 512GB of storage that’s significan

zh.title: 苹果涨价前你还能在MacBook上获得的最优惠价格
zh.summary: 苹果在Prime Day期间提高了Mac和iPad价格，使现有折扣更显珍贵——13英寸MacBook Air M5原本降价$150，在新定价下成为$350的节省，为消费者创造了大幅省钱的机会。

title: Our 36 favorite gaming deals on Prime Day for Switch, PS5, and Xbox
summary: The Verge highlights substantial Prime Day discounts on Nintendo Switch 2, PlayStation 5, and Xbox games and accessories, with savings up to $30-50 on recent and classic titles, plus gaming peripherals and memory upgrades.
content:
There are some some sizable discounts on new and recent hits from the last few years for the Nintendo Switch 2, PlayStation 5, and the Xbox Series X / S for Prime Day. Most Amazon game deals are physical copies, but every so often there’s a better or equivalent price on digital versions, as well as some matched deals at Best Buy.
In addition to game deals, we’re also on the hunt for discounted gaming accessories. This is usually a pretty good time to save what you can on things like gaming headsets, controllers, gaming mice, etc. While it’s a good time to get a microSD Express card for your Switch 2, don’t bank on any big discounts on SSDs for your PS5. Woof, those are expensive now. Thanks, RAMageddon.
The best deals on Nintendo Switch 2 games
Best Buy has discounted Nintendo Switch and Switch 2 games — both physical and digital versions. It includes options like Street Fighter 6 Year 1-2 Fighters Edition on Switch 2 (physical) for $29.99 ($30 off) and Super Mario Odyssey (physical) and (digital) for $39.99 ($20 off).
Pokémon Legends: Z-A
Pokémon Legends: Z-A is the first game in the main series with a real-time battling system instead of the traditional turn-based formula. You’re still catching pokémon, leveling up, trading, and battling in the game’s Paris-inspired setting, but the more action-oriented battles and smooth performance (on the Nintendo Switch 2) are very welcome.

Where to Buy:

 $69 $44.99 at Amazon (Switch 2)
 $69.99 at Best Buy (Switch 2)


Mario + Rabbids Kingdom Battle and Sparks of Hope dual pack
The Mario + Rabbids games are excellent turn-based strategy adventures that pair classic Mario characters with the chaotic Rabbids. The dual pack is a download code in a box that collects both the original Mario + Rabbids Kingdom Battle and its sequel Mario + Rabbids Sparks of Hope, both for the Nintendo Switch.

Where to Buy:

 $28.99 $9.99 at Amazon (with Prime)


Resident Evil Requiem
The latest entry in the long-running survival horror series, wit

zh.summary: 本文介绍了Nintendo Switch 2、PlayStation 5和Xbox游戏及配件在Prime Day上的重大折扣，热门和经典游戏可节省30-50美元，还包括游戏外设和内存升级的优惠。

title: OpenAI limits GPT-5.6 rollout after government request, says restrictions shouldn’t be the norm
summary: OpenAI announced it will limit the initial rollout of GPT-5.6 following a government request, while expressing concern that regulatory oversight shouldn't become the standard approach to AI releases. The company argues that restrictive processes prevent access for developers, enterprises, and security professionals who need advanced tools.
content: “We don’t believe this kind of government access process should become the long-term default,” says OpenAI. “It keeps the best tools from users, developers, enterprises, cyber defenders, and global partners who need them.”

zh.title: 应政府要求，OpenAI 限制 GPT-5.6 推出，称限制不应成为常态
zh.summary: OpenAI 宣布将在政府要求后限制 GPT-5.6 的初期推出，同时表达了对监管监督不应成为人工智能发布标准方式的担忧。该公司辩称，限制性流程阻碍了开发者、企业和需要先进工具的安全专业人士的获取。

title: Netflix now requires every user profile to be tied to unique email address
summary: Netflix has begun enforcing a policy requiring each user profile to be tied to a unique email address, effectively ending widespread password sharing that started June 15. The change marks a significant shift in Netflix's business model toward individual account accountability.
content: Update began June 15 and will no longer allow you to share your login info.

title: OpenAI poaches Uber India chief to lead its biggest market outside the U.S.

title: The beautiful shame
summary: Trump's strict immigration policies have prevented numerous international sports fans and athletes, including some World Cup players, from traveling to the United States for matches. This discriminatory barrier contrasts with American tourists' freedom to travel globally and highlights exclusionary restrictions facing visitors from Africa, Asia, and the Middle East.
content:
While European tourists marvel at ranch dressing, Buc-ee's, and other wonders of Middle America, would-be World Cup attendees from Africa, Asia, and the Middle East have experienced a different American pastime: exclusion. President Donald Trump's nakedly racist immigration policies have prevented scores of people from traveling to the United States for the event - even, in some cases, the players themselves.
Swiss forward Breel Embolo wasn't allowed to board the team's flight to the US because of a criminal conviction from 2018 and had to apply for an emergency visa. In the wake of the US's attack on Iran, the Iranian team moved its traini …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 美丽的羞愧
zh.summary: 特朗普的严格移民政策阻止了许多国际体育迷和运动员（包括一些世界杯选手）前往美国参加比赛。这个歧视性障碍与美国游客全球旅游自由形成对比，突显了来自非洲、亚洲和中东游客面临的排他性限制。

title: This video bird feeder is the surprise hit of Prime Day
summary: The BirdBuddy Pro smart bird feeder with solar panels has become an unexpected Prime Day bestseller, discounted from $299 to $168 on Amazon due to new models in development. The device combines a camera, bird recognition AI, and solar charging in a feeder designed to resemble traditional hardware, though advanced features require a subscription.
content:
I can understand why The Verge readers are flocking to the BirdBuddy deal we posted at the beginning of Prime Day.
The BirdBuddy Pro with Solar Panels is a wholesome upgrade for your yard, but the full price of $299 is tough to stomach. After all, the BirdBuddy is essentially a video doorbell and solar panels stuck to a bird feeder, something you could assemble yourself in an hour for under $100. Specialized features like bird recognition and naming are locked behind a subscription, so you’re looking at a potentially costly investment for your yard.
On the other hand, the discounted Prime Day price of $168 at Amazon is a lot more palatable — and probably why it’s been the most unexpected hit of all the things we posted.
Birdbuddy Pro (solar)
Birdbuddy’s charming, camera-equipped feeder identifies and snaps shots of each bird that stops by, supplementing its 5-megapixel stills with insightful facts via an app. The solar roof helps keep the camera’s battery topped up even when it’s cloudy outside.

Where to Buy:

 $299 $168 at Amazon

The steep sale likely reflects the fact that Birdbuddy has new bird feeders in the works. The company announced a pair of new video bird feeders at CES in January. The BirdBuddy 2, which will retail for $199, has a rotating camera with a wider field of view that can take landscape or portrait postcards, but otherwise is very similar to the Pro with solar panels. They were briefly available for pre-order, and made their way to some reviewers and scattered buyers, but aren’t currently listed on the BirdBuddy website. The BirdBuddy 2 Mini has a smaller housing, but lacks solar panels, and will retail for $129 when it launches this year.
Smart bird feeders are also an increasingly crowded space. There are other options to consider, like the Coolfly Aura that we recently reviewed around the same price. You can find plenty of budget options on Amazon, too, though you’ll have a harder time getting the same degree of polish delivered by Birdbudd

zh.title: 这款视频鸟食器是Prime Day的意外热销品
zh.summary: BirdBuddy Pro智能鸟食器配备太阳能面板，成为了Prime Day的意外畅销品，在亚马逊上从299美元降至168美元，因为新款型号正在开发中。该设备结合了摄像头、鸟类识别人工智能和太阳能充电功能，外形设计类似传统硬件，但高级功能需要订阅。

title: Antibiotic "megacluster" discovery provides new strategy to fight superbugs
summary: Researchers have discovered an antibiotic "megacluster" offering a promising new approach to combating antibiotic-resistant superbugs and expanding the arsenal of effective treatments. This breakthrough represents significant progress in addressing the growing challenge of drug-resistant infections.
content: It's "an exciting advance in efforts to restock the antibiotic arsenal."

title: Why everyone from OpenAI to SpaceX is building their own chips (and turning up the heat on Nvidia)
summary: Major tech companies including OpenAI, Google, Apple, and SpaceX are developing custom AI chips to reduce dependency on Nvidia's dominant market position. OpenAI's new Jalapeño inference chip, built with Broadcom, exemplifies the industry shift toward vertical integration and breaking single-supplier lock-in.
content: Nvidia has dominated the AI chip market for years, but the era of total dependence might be ending.   OpenAI just shared its plans to spice things up with Jalapeño, its custom inference chip built with Broadcom, joining Google, Apple, and SpaceX in a growing list of companies building their way out of single-supplier risk. The goal is less of a […]

title: Russian hackers were behind $2.5 billion hack of Jaguar Land Rover: Report
summary: A major cyberattack on automotive company Jaguar Land Rover resulting in $2.5 billion in damages has been attributed to Russian hackers. The incident ranks among the most damaging and costly cybersecurity breaches in recent years.
content: The hack on car giant Jaguar Land Rover last year was one the most disrupting, damaging, and costly hacks of the last few years.

zh.title: 俄罗斯黑客被指策划捷豹路虎25亿美元黑客攻击事件
zh.summary: 针对汽车公司捷豹路虎造成25亿美元损失的重大网络攻击已被认定为俄罗斯黑客所为。该事件是近年来损失最大、代价最高的网络安全漏洞之一。

title: OpenAI unveils GPT-5.6 amid US AI regulatory drama
summary: OpenAI has released GPT-5.6, a new model suite including Sol (flagship), Terra (medium-tier), and Luna (fast/affordable versions), less than 24 hours after announcing a staggered rollout in response to Trump administration pressure. The models show improvements in coding, cybersecurity, and biology tasks, with Sol priced competitively at $5/$30 per million tokens.
content:
Less than 24 hours after news broke that OpenAI would stagger its next model release at the request of the Trump administration, that model, GPT-5.6, is here.  On Friday, the company unveiled the limited preview of its new GPT 5.6 model suite: Sol, the flagship; Terra, a medium-tier model for "high-volume work"; and Luna, a "fast and affordable" everyday model. OpenAI says it's especially skilled at coding, cybersecurity, and biology, as well as staying focused during long-horizon agentic AI tasks. 
Per million tokens, GPT-5.6 Sol is priced at $5 input / $30 output (nearly half the cost of Anthropic's Claude Fable 5, which is $10 input / $5 …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: OpenAI在美国AI监管争议中推出GPT-5.6
zh.summary: OpenAI发布了GPT-5.6，包括Sol（旗舰版）、Terra（中端版）和Luna（快速/经济版）的新型模型套件，仅在宣布应对特朗普政府压力的分阶段推出后不到24小时。这些模型在编码、网络安全和生物学任务中表现出改进，Sol的价格具有竞争力，为每百万token 5美元/30美元。

title: Smart lock maker Level has been gutted and its founders are out
summary: Assa Abloy has dismantled most of Level Home's workforce and is integrating the smart lock company into its Kwikset division, ending independent operations of the company known for embedding electronics inside traditional deadbolts. The restructuring has resulted in immediate layoffs of the majority of staff.
content:
Level’s defining innovation was hiding the battery, motor, and electronics that power the smart lock inside the deadbolt itself. | Photo by Dan Seifert / The Verge	

Assa Abloy has laid off the majority of staff at Level Home, the smart lock company known for building smart tech into traditional-looking deadbolts, and is folding the business into Kwikset, according to a source familiar with the decision.
The Verge obtained exclusive details from a person familiar with the restructuring who requested anonymity as they were part of the layoffs. They shared an audio recording of a meeting in which Peter Boriskin, CTO for Assa Abloy North America, and Kimberly Cummins, head of North American HR, informed the staff that their positions had been eliminated, effective immediately, as "a part of a larger restru …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 智能锁制造商Level遭大幅裁员，创始人已离职
zh.summary: Assa Abloy已经裁减了Level Home的大部分员工，并正在将这家以在传统门锁内嵌入电子设备而闻名的智能锁公司整合到其Kwikset部门中，结束了该公司的独立运营。此次重组导致大多数员工立即被裁。

title: Tesla settles FSD crash lawsuit as federal investigations continue
summary: Tesla has settled a lawsuit related to a fatal 2023 crash involving its Full Self-Driving system, even as federal investigations into the technology continue. The resolution comes amid ongoing scrutiny of Tesla's advanced driver assistance capabilities.
content: The lawsuit was connected to a fatal 2023 crash involving a vehicle using the company's advanced driver assistance system known as Full Self-Driving.

zh.title: 特斯拉在联邦调查继续之际和解FSD碰撞诉讼
zh.summary: 特斯拉已和解一项与2023年涉及其全自动驾驶系统的致命碰撞有关的诉讼,尽管对该技术的联邦调查仍在继续。这一解决方案出现在对特斯拉先进驾驶辅助功能持续审查的背景下。

title: TikTok’s road to becoming a super app
summary: TikTok is reportedly developing features to evolve from a short-form video platform into a comprehensive "super app" covering most of users' digital activities. This expansion reflects the platform's strategy to deepen engagement and diversify revenue streams beyond content.
content: TikTok may be working to become the app that people use for most of their digital activities.

zh.title: TikTok成为超级应用之路
zh.summary: TikTok据报道正在开发功能,以从短视频平台演变为覆盖用户大部分数字活动的全面"超级应用"。这一扩展反映了该平台深化用户参与度和拓展内容之外收入流多元化的战略。

title: Ars Live: What's the latest in the aftermath of the New Glenn catastrophe?
summary: Ars Technica is hosting a live discussion examining developments following the New Glenn launch failure, inviting audience questions about the incident's implications and consequences. The livestream provides an opportunity to explore the aftermath of this significant space industry event.
content: Join us on the livestream at 1 pm ET and ask questions about the aftermath of New Glenn.

zh.title: Ars Live: New Glenn灾难之后的最新进展是什么?
zh.summary: Ars Technica正主持一场实时讨论,审视New Glenn发射失败后的发展动态,邀请观众就事件的影响和后果提出问题。这场直播提供了探索这一重大航天工业事件的机会。

title: It’s not about Anthropic vs. OpenAI anymore
summary: As AI models advance, their capabilities now have significant political implications that transcend individual company competition, requiring coordinated industry action to address responsibly. The landscape has evolved beyond corporate rivalry to focus on the broader societal impact of AI development.
content: AI models have progressed to the point where their capabilities have real political consequences. Dealing with those consequences will require collective action.

zh.title: 这不再是Anthropic与OpenAI的竞争
zh.summary: 随着AI模型的进步，其能力现在具有超越单个公司竞争的重要政治影响，需要行业协调采取行动负责任地应对。这一格局已从企业竞争演变为关注AI发展的更广泛社会影响。

title: Xreal’s best USB-C smart glasses are $50 off, but not for long
summary: Xreal is offering limited-time Prime Day discounts on its USB-C smart glasses: the Xreal One Pro at $549 (down $50) and the entry-level Xreal 1S at $399 (down $50), both featuring micro-OLED displays with three degrees of freedom. The deals expire at 1:00 AM ET and represent rare discounts on premium AR glasses that connect directly to phones, tablets, and gaming handhelds.
content:
If you’ve been curious about the emerging world of smart glasses, Prime Day is your chance to try some of the best models with a rare discount from Best Buy or directly from Xreal. The high-end Xreal One Pro is $549, $50 lower than the usual price, and the more entry-level Xreal 1S is $399, $50 off the usual price, but only until 1:00 AM ET. Both feature tiny micro-OLED screens filtered through optics that simulate a humongous screen in front of your eyes anywhere you want, complete with three degrees of freedom, so the screen can stay put even when you move around.
Xreal 1S

Where to Buy:

 $449.99 $399.99 at Best Buy

Xreal One Pro
 

Where to Buy:

 $599 $549 at Best Buy
 $599 $549 at Xreal

Both pairs benefit from Bose-tuned built-in speakers and sport impressive low-end performance, which is great for movies and games. They have the premium build quality you’d expect from a pair of glasses that cost hundreds of dollars and are well-balanced and relatively lightweight to prevent ear strain. These Xreal glasses can connect directly to devices via USB-C, including phones, tablets, and handhelds like the Steam Deck. However, they cannot connect to a Nintendo Switch or Switch 2.
Between the two headsets, the One Pro’s screen does a better job of minimizing reflections, has better black levels in bright settings, and is overall crisper than the 1S, but the feature set is largely the same.
Read our smart glasses comparison.

zh.title: Xreal最佳USB-C智能眼镜降价50美元，但优惠不会持续太久
zh.summary: Xreal在Prime Day期间为其USB-C智能眼镜提供限时折扣：Xreal One Pro降至$549（优惠$50）和入门级Xreal 1S降至$399（优惠$50），两款均配备微OLED显示屏和三个自由度。这些优惠将于美国东部时间凌晨1:00截止，代表了对可直接连接到手机、平板电脑和游戏掌机的高端AR眼镜的罕见折扣。

title: Xprize founder says ‘humans behave better when they’re being watched’
summary: Xprize founder Peter Diamandis has joined other tech executives in advocating for expanded global surveillance, arguing that monitoring makes human behavior more responsible. His comments echo similar positions made by other Silicon Valley leaders, notably Larry Ellison's 2024 surveillance advocacy.
content: Peter Diamandis is the latest tech executive to argue that global surveillance will make the world a better place, following Larry Ellison's comments in 2024.

zh.title: Xprize创始人称"当人们被监视时，他们会表现得更好"
zh.summary: Xprize创始人Peter Diamandis与其他科技高管一起倡导扩大全球监控，主张监视能使人类行为更加负责任。他的言论与其他硅谷领袖的类似立场相呼应，特别是Larry Ellison在2024年的监控倡议。

title: VW may close four factories to adapt to the future, report says
summary: Volkswagen is considering closing four factories as part of a restructuring effort amid declining sales in the US and China. The move reflects the company's attempt to realign manufacturing capacity with weakening market demand.
content: With falling sales in the US and especially China, VW Group wants to restructure.

zh.title: 大众汽车可能关闭四家工厂以适应未来，报告称
zh.summary: 大众汽车正在考虑关闭四家工厂，作为重组工作的一部分，以应对美国和中国销售额下降。此举反映了该公司试图通过重新调整制造能力以适应不断减弱的市场需求。

title: Feedbacks upon feedbacks: Rock weathering and the climate
summary: Rock weathering processes can either release or absorb atmospheric carbon dioxide depending on rock type, creating important climate feedback loops. Understanding these natural mechanisms is critical to comprehending long-term climate dynamics.
content: Rock weathering may release or draw down carbon dioxide—it depends on the rock.

zh.title: 反馈接反馈：岩石风化与气候
zh.summary: 岩石风化过程可以释放或吸收大气二氧化碳，具体取决于岩石类型，从而产生重要的气候反馈循环。理解这些自然机制对于深入认识长期气候动力学至关重要。

title: SpaceX plans to launch Starlink mobile service in the US
summary: SpaceX plans to launch Starlink-based mobile phone service in the US, testing whether the company can successfully enter the mass-market mobile business. The service would leverage existing satellite infrastructure to provide connectivity.
content: Move would test whether group can turn ambition into a mass-market phone business.

zh.title: SpaceX计划在美国推出Starlink移动服务
zh.summary: SpaceX计划在美国推出基于Starlink的移动电话服务，测试该公司是否能够成功进入大众市场移动业务。该服务将利用现有的卫星基础设施提供连接。

title: Robotaxis drive miles just to get cleaned and charged; this new startup wants to fix that
summary: Y Combinator-backed startup Aseon Labs has raised $10 million to address inefficiencies in autonomous taxi operations, where vehicles waste mileage traveling for cleaning and charging. The funding from Crane Venture Partners aims to optimize these critical logistics processes.
content: Aseon Labs, which came out of Y Combinator's 2026 spring cohort, has raised $10 million from Crane Venture Partners and others.

zh.title: 机器人出租车为清洁和充电而驾驶数英里；这家新创公司想要解决这个问题
zh.summary: Y Combinator支持的初创公司Aseon Labs筹集了1000万美元，以解决自动驾驶出租车运营中的低效率问题，其中车辆在前往清洁和充电地点时浪费里程。来自Crane Venture Partners的融资旨在优化这些关键的物流流程。

title: Early Bird pricing ends tonight for TechCrunch Founder Summit
summary: TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 is offering early-bird pricing with savings up to $190, with the promotional rate ending June 27 at 11:59 PM PT. Standard registration rates increase after the early-bird period expires.
content: Save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026. Early Bird pricing ends today, at 11:59 p.m. PT, after which rates increase. Register now.

zh.title: TechCrunch创始人峰会的早鸟价格今晚结束
zh.summary: TechCrunch创始人峰会2026提供早鸟价格，最高可节省190美元，促销价格于6月27日太平洋时间晚上11:59结束。早鸟期限过期后，标准注册费用将增加。

title: Prime Day is offering rare discounts on Philips Hue smart lights
summary: Rare discounts on Philips Hue smart lights are available during Prime Day, with significant price drops across the company's lighting lineup including starter kits, sleep lamps, and portable options. This represents one of the best opportunities of the year to invest in smart home lighting at reduced prices.
content:
Philips Hue products don’t often see major discounts, which makes this year’s Prime Day deals especially notable. Prices have dropped significantly across much of the company’s smart lighting lineup, with deals on everything from smart bulb starter kits and sleep lamps to smart buttons. In some cases, the lowest prices are available directly from Philips Hue rather than Amazon, so we’ve rounded up the best deals currently available. If you’ve been thinking about investing in Philips Hue, now is one of the best opportunities we’ve seen all year to do so for less.
Philips Hue Twilight sleep-wake lamp
Philips Hue Twilight is a smart bedside lamp designed around circadian rhythms to help you wake up more naturally and wind down more peacefully. Its smooth, deep dimming is exceptionally gentle, and the dual light sources provide ample light when needed.

Where to Buy:

 $307.99 $261.79 at Amazon
 $307.99 $261.99 at Best Buy

Philips Hue smart bulb starter kit
The Philips Hue smart bulb starter kit comes with color-changing bulbs that can be controlled with Alexa, Google Assistant, or the companion app. The included Hue Bridge lets you set custom lighting routines and expand your setup to 50 lights.

Where to Buy:

 $142.99 $67.99 at Amazon (two bulbs)

Philips Hue Essential strip light (16 feet)
Part of the company’s new Essentials line, the Essential 16ft LED Strip Light, RGBIC, can work with or without a Hue bridge and has all the same features as Hue’s higher-priced models.

Where to Buy:

 $59.99 $50.99 at Amazon

 Philips Hue Go Smart Portable Table Lamp
Philips Hue’s water resistant lamp can display millions of colors and lasts 48 hours on a single charge. The rechargeable lamp also offers customizable lighting effects and support for Matter, so you can control it via any major smart home platform.

Where to Buy:

 $179.99 $123.47 at Amazon
 $179.99 $138.99 at Best Buy

Philips Hue Play HDMI Sync Box 8K
An HDMI box, the Hue Sync syncs your Hue lights with whatever’

zh.summary: Prime Day 期间 Philips Hue 智能灯获得罕见折扣，整个照明产品线（包括入门套件、睡眠灯和便携式选项）价格大幅下降。这是全年以优惠价格投资智能家居照明的最佳机会之一。

title: With GTA looming, consoles are getting expensive at the worst possible time
summary: Grand Theft Auto VI's upcoming release is driving console purchase interest as a major system seller, but rising hardware costs are pricing out potential buyers who've been waiting since GTA V. The timing mismatch between game demand and expensive console options creates a challenge for the industry.
content:
The release of Grand Theft Auto VI is a singular moment, the kind of massive cultural phenomenon that makes people want to go out and buy a console to play it. It is the preeminent modern example of what's known as a "system seller." There's almost certainly a large audience of people who were waiting to buy a console because all they really play on it is GTA, and they haven't needed to upgrade since GTA V. But there's one big problem: At the same time people are getting excited to finally play GTA, the hardware it runs on is becoming prohibitively expensive.
Fans have been waiting for the next Grand Theft Auto for a long time. GTA V origin …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 随着 GTA VI 推出，游戏机在最坏的时刻变得昂贵
zh.summary: 《侠盗猎车手 VI》即将推出推动了游戏机购买需求作为重要的系统级游戏，但不断上升的硬件成本使得自 GTA V 以来一直在等待的潜在买家无法承受。游戏发布需求与昂贵游戏机选项之间的时间错位给行业带来了挑战。

title: Samsung will soon start charging to access its smart home API
summary: Samsung is introducing paid subscription tiers for SmartThings API access starting October 2026, with a $4.99 monthly plan for individual developers. The change will impact advanced smart home users and third-party integrations like Home Assistant that directly access the API.
content:
From October this year Samsung will roll out a variety of new paid tiers for access to its SmartThings API, including a $4.99 monthly plan for "non-commercial, individual developers."
It won't just be developers that pay the price though. Some more advanced smart home users are likely to fall afoul of the rule change if they directly access the SmartThings API for more flexible smart home controls, or use third-party tools that do the same. "Use of the Home Assistant integration will be affected by their changes and will fall under their new 'personal plans,'" wrote Paulus Schoutsen, founder of open-source smart home platform Home Assistant …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 三星即将开始对其智能家居 API 访问收费
zh.summary: 三星从 2026 年 10 月开始为 SmartThings API 访问引入付费订阅计划，为个人开发者提供每月 4.99 美元的选项。此更改将影响直接访问 API 的高级智能家居用户和第三方集成（如 Home Assistant）。

title: Apple’s most powerful Macs might be waiting until 2027 for big processor upgrades
summary: Apple is reportedly skipping M6 Pro and Max variants in favor of jumping directly to M7 chips, with base M6 coming this year and M7 not arriving until 2027. This strategy leaves high-end Mac users without major processor upgrades for an extended period.
content:
Apple is reportedly skipping the M6 Pro, Max, and Ultra variants in favour of jumping to its M7 chip lineup. | Photo: Antonio G. Di Benedetto / The Verge	

Apple is expected to shake up its usual Mac silicon release strategy, with Bloomberg's Mark Gurman reporting that there won't be Pro or Max versions of the upcoming M6 chip. Instead, Apple wants to "fast-track technologies that it originally planned to release later" with the M7 launch next year.
The Cupertino company will reportedly only release a base model M6 chip "as early as this year," with the base M7 chip set to launch sometime in the first half of 2027. The M7 Pro and M7 Max are then expected to follow "as early as the end of 2027." That could leave the most powerful Macs in a lurch since Apple's base chips are typically aimed at e …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 苹果最强大的Mac可能要等到2027年才能获得大型处理器升级
zh.summary: 据报道，苹果将跳过M6 Pro和Max变体，直接推出M7芯片，基础M6将在今年推出，而M7直到2027年才会发布。这一策略使高端Mac用户在很长一段时间内无法获得重大处理器升级。

title: Rocket Report: China may soon attempt booster landing; Rocket Lab does rapid response
summary: China is reportedly preparing a booster landing attempt while Rocket Lab conducts rapid response missions, amid ongoing questions about SpaceX's Transporter program. These developments highlight evolving competition and operational strategies in the commercial spaceflight sector.
content: Is SpaceX planning to end its Transporter program?

zh.title: 火箭报告：中国可能很快尝试助推器着陆；Rocket Lab进行快速响应
zh.summary: 据报道，中国正在准备助推器着陆尝试，而Rocket Lab正在执行快速响应任务，同时人们对SpaceX运输计划提出了持续的质疑。这些发展突出了商业航天部门中不断发展的竞争和操作策略。

title: It’s the last day of Prime Day — here are over 130 great deals to choose from
summary: Prime Day concludes with over 130 deals across TVs, smart home devices, audio equipment, and other gadgets, with popular items like AirPods Max 2 and Echo devices discounted. The comprehensive final-day coverage represents the culmination of extensive deal hunting across all product categories.
content:
We’ve arrived at the final day of Prime Day, which at this point should probably be called “Prime Week.” We’ve found discounts on all manner of gadgets, including TVs, smart home tech, chargers, headphones, and more. Some of the best deals have started selling out at some retailers, so if you’ve been craving a popular upgrade like the AirPods Max 2, time is running low.
The good news is that our team is still hard at work, and in addition to the deals that remain in stock, the retailers sometimes save up a few extras for the last day (like this Echo Spot that got a little cheaper). This roundup is our pride and joy; the culmination of over four days of deal hunting by our entire team. We’ve worked tirelessly for the last week and arrived at a list of over 120 discounted items (and growing) that we’re happy to share with you.
Of course, our Prime Day coverage spans every category The Verge staff touches, and is a great place to explore the full breadth of discounts we’re able to find on the stuff we’ve tested, regularly use, and love. We genuinely enjoy helping you save on cool tech and fun gadgets that are actually worth your hard-earned money, especially when everything is getting more expensive.
Smart home deals
Echo Show 8 (2025)
The updated Echo Show 8 features an 8.7-inch display with 720p resolution, wider viewing angles, and higher contrast. It includes a 13-megapixel camera, new stereo speakers, and supports Alexa Plus, while doubling as a smart home hub with support for Zigbee, Matter, and Thread. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $179.99 $124.99 at Amazon
 $179.99 at Best Buy
 $179.99 at Target

Amazon’s Echo Show 11 is on sale for $149.99 ($80 off) at Amazon, which marks its best price to date. It’s almost identical to the Echo Show 8, except that it offers a larger and sharper 1080p resolution.
You can buy the latest Echo Show 5 for $59.99 ($30 off) at Amazon, which is one of its better prices in recent months though $20 shy of its all-time low. The smar

zh.title: 这是Prime Day的最后一天——这里有130多个超优惠交易可供选择
zh.summary: Prime Day以超过130笔交易结束，涉及电视、智能家居设备、音频设备和其他小工具，包括AirPods Max 2和Echo设备等热门商品的折扣。全面的最后一天报道代表了对所有产品类别的广泛交易搜索的总结。

title: Trump Mobile will take your $499 right now
summary: Trump Mobile's T1 phone is now available for direct purchase at $499 without requiring a deposit, shifting from the previous preorder model that charged $100 down. Some early preorder customers have still not received their devices despite the expanded availability.
content:
Yours for $499 (plus tax and an indeterminate amount of time for processing and shipping). | Screenshot: Trump Mobile	

Where's the Trump phone? We're going to keep talking about it every week. We still don't have the phones we preordered yet, but this week the T1 hit open sale, no deposit required.
Trump Mobile's T1 Phone is now available for anyone to buy directly. The phone has previously trickled out to a small number of preorder customers - though The Verge is still waiting for both of its handsets - but now you can claim your own without having to place a $100 deposit.
Android Authority spotted the change to the Trump Mobile website, which now lets you pay $499 directly for the phone, rather than paying $100 first. In true Trump Mobile fashion, they'v …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 特朗普手机现在以499美元直接发售
zh.summary: 特朗普手机的T1手机现在可以以499美元直接购买，无需订金，改变了之前需要支付100美元定金的预购模式。尽管可用性扩大，一些早期预订客户仍未收到他们的设备。
